description:
Remove Rounded Corners from Full-Width Sections

Update the styling for full-width sections to display with square corners instead of rounded corners, starting with the hero section.

Requirements:
- Remove border-radius from the hero section
- Identify all other full-width sections in the application
- Remove border-radius from all full-width sections (e.g., banners, footers, full-width CTAs)
- Preserve rounded corners for contained/card-style components
- Ensure consistent styling across all breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- Verify visual consistency after changes
